entities.description: A chemical mutagen used to induce morphological mutations

entities.name: BROAD-FEW-LEAFLETS
entities.description: A morphological mutation characterized by five to nine large leaflets per leaf

entities.name: OUTWARDLY CURVED WINGS
entities.description: A morphological mutation where flower wings are curved outwards, exposing the keel petal

entities.name: JGM 4
entities.description: A mutant line developed from the broad-few-leaflets mutant

entities.name: JGM 5
entities.description: A mutant line developed from the outwardly curved wings mutant
